section.title: PostGIS 3.7.0beta1
section.para: This version requires GEOS 3.10 or higher. PostgreSQL 14-19beta1 required. Proj 6.1+ required. To take advantage of all features postgis extension features, GEOS 3.15+ is needed. To take advantage of all postgis_sfcgal extension features SFCGAL 2.2+ is needed.
